Listen actively and try to understand where others are coming from, even if you disagree with their views. Avoid being confrontational or judgmental, as this can quickly escalate into heated debates. Instead, focus on finding common ground and working towards a solution that prioritizes the well-being of all individuals involved. Remember, effective communication is key to resolving conflicts and finding mutually beneficial solutions.
